label_contracts.blocked_reason: Fees/slippage and neutral treatment are explicit, but TP2 HIT versus WIN semantics, historical artifact lineage, and all displayed metric horizons are not fully proven from prediction artifacts.
label_contracts.input_price: historical_klines.close joined at signal timestamp as entry
label_contracts.maturity_requirements: requires future candles after signal timestamp; no future candles create OPEN/FLAT row
label_contracts.neutral_handling: FLAT possible in outcome_labeler but excluded by ml_engine TARGET_LABELS
label_contracts.regime_assignment_timing: regime is joined from signal timestamp in ml_engine historical dataset
label_contracts.target_price: future candle low/high/close depending on SL/TP/horizon path
label_contracts.target_timestamp: future candle timestamp or blank when no future candles
label_contracts.tp2_hit_vs_win_mismatch: outcome_labeler returns status WIN for TP2 hits while ml_engine TARGET_LABELS includes TP2 HIT; legacy artifacts may mix TP2 HIT and WIN semantics.

larger_fold_findings: Insufficient rows for larger-fold diagnostic: need at least 30, found 0.

limitations: No predictions are fabricated from labels.
Display-value reproduction is separated from full evaluation reproduction.
Missing or stale artifacts are not invented.

ml_model_upgrade_findings: Diagnostic/planning-only: no model training, inference, prediction, threshold, readiness, or execution behavior is changed.
ml_model_upgrade_recommendation: Keep execution disabled and paper-only. Use this plan to investigate class imbalance, cost-sensitive/threshold-aware training, probability calibration, regime-aware modeling, and feature reliability before any future model upgrade PR.
paper_filter_candidate_basis: Diagnostic filtered-cohort comparison only; does not drive trading logic, runtime configuration, signal generation, training, prediction, threshold selection, readiness gates, or execution.
paper_filter_candidate_recommendation: Keep candidate OFF by default. Continue paper-only shadow evidence collection; do not apply threshold 0.80 to runtime signals or unlock execution until future governance review explicitly approves it.
paper_filter_shadow_review_findings: Scorecard is diagnostic/governance-only and is not a permission system.
Candidate remains disabled; threshold is not applied to runtime signals.
paper_filter_shadow_review_recommendatio: Keep candidate OFF by default. Use this scorecard only for future paper-only governance review; do not apply threshold 0.80, change config/training/predictions/threshold selection/readiness gates, or unlock execution.

preprocessing_guard_findings.evidence: Holdout path splits raw prepared rows first, fits OneHotEncoder on train_dataset only, then transforms test/all rows with the train-fitted preprocessor.
Each walk-forward fold fits preprocessing on that fold's train slice and transforms the fold test slice using the same train-fitted state.

raw_closed_source_recommendation: Diagnostic only: review selected/candidate source before using it for model repair; do not change training, inference, thresholds, readiness, or execution.

findings.evidence: ml_engine.build_ml_dataset uses as-of feature joins and temporal feature guard status is also reported separately.
